title: The United States has terminated its safeguard measure on large residential washer
bodyHtml:
The United States has notified the WTO  the termination of its safeguard measure on large residential washers (classified in 8450.20.00, 8450.11.00, 8450.90.20 and 8450.90.60 ).

The measure, pursuant to Section 201 of the Trade Act of 1974, was designed to protect American manufacturers from destructive import competition.  With the measure taken in the form of tariff-rate quotas (TRQs), additional tariffs between 20 and 40 percent had been applied depending on the import volumes.

On May 16, 2019, the Presidential Proclamation 9887, which removed Turkey from the list of GSP beneficiary countries, and modified the safeguard measure so that imports from Turkiye had been subject to the measure.

According to the notification the safeguard measure has been terminated due to the fact that it has expired and no further extension has been requested by the domestic industry.

Please click to view the notification
